scripts.build:gh-pages: rm -rf docs && ng build --configuration production --output-path docs --base-href "/" --no-ssr && cp -a docs/browser/. docs/ && rm -rf docs/browser && echo 'mrvaluations.co.uk' > docs/CNAME && cp docs/index.html docs/404.html
scripts.deploy:wait: DEPLOY_ID=$(gh api repos/1Guv/mrg/deployments --jq '.[0].id') && echo 'Waiting for GitHub Pages deployment...' && STATE=pending && while [ "$STATE" != "success" ] && [ "$STATE" != "failure" ] && [ "$STATE" != "error" ]; do sleep 15; STATE=$(gh api repos/1Guv/mrg/deployments/$DEPLOY_ID/statuses --jq '.[0].state' 2>/dev/null || echo pending); echo "Status: $STATE"; done && osascript -e 'display notification "mrvaluations.co.uk is now live" with title "GitHub Pages Deployed" sound name "Glass"' && echo 'Live at https://mrvaluations.co.uk'
scripts.ship: git add -A && git commit -m 'Latest build' && git push && npm run build:gh-pages && git add docs/ && git commit -m 'Production build for GitHub Pages' && git push && npm run deploy:wait
